overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character walking through a sunlit natural landscape. The scene transitions from a grassy meadow with pine trees down to a rocky riverbank, following the water's edge between tall rock formations. High-quality game engine rendering with realistic vegetation and lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy meadow with scattered pine trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall grass toward a rocky cliff formation in the distance

entered.detail: cluster of evergreen pine trees with brown trunks and green needles
large tan and gray rock formation rising above the tree line
tall green and yellow grass covering the ground
rocky outcrops visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a sunlit grassy meadow dotted with pine trees. Rocky cliff faces rise in the distance against a bright blue sky with scattered clouds. The ground is covered in tall wild grass that sways slightly as the character moves forward.

events.description: ground surface changes from grass to rocky gravel as approaching the river
river water becomes visible on the right side of the frame

agents.ego_description: walking downhill toward the riverbank, navigating around a fallen dead tree

entered.detail: leafless dead tree with twisted branches lying on the ground
gravel and stone covered ground leading down to water
calm reflective water surface of the river
low shrubbery growing along the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The terrain transitions from grass to rocky gravel as the character descends toward a river. A prominent dead tree lies on the left while the river comes into view on the right. The character continues walking along the sloping bank with cliffs now closer on the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky river path between cliffs and water

events.description: character turns slightly to follow the curve of the riverbank

agents.ego_description: walking along the rocky riverbank with water on the right and cliffs on the left

entered.detail: steep vertical rock wall with layered sedimentary formations
large boulders and stones scattered along the shoreline

segments.scene_description: The character follows a narrow rocky path along the river's edge, with steep cliffs rising on the left and calm water flowing on the right. The ground is covered in gravel and scattered stones. The camera continues forward, revealing more of the winding river canyon with distant rock formations ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit meadow that gradually descends into a narrow, rocky river canyon. It begins with the character walking through tall, swaying wild grass dotted with pine trees under a bright blue sky. As the terrain shifts from grass to rocky gravel, the camera descends a sloping bank past a prominent dead tree while the river emerges on the right. The scene then narrows as the character follows a path of scattered stones, with steep cliffs rising sharply on the left and calm water flowing alongside. Finally, the camera continues forward along the river's edge, revealing the winding canyon and distant rock formations ahead.
